title: baccharis pohlii
intro: Baccharis pohlii, also known as the Pohl's groundsel tree, is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Baccharis pohlii include its ability to help reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Baccharis pohlii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, making it a versatile herbal remedy.
